---
title: "Research"
bibliography: orcid.bib
csl: apa.csl
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

# Research Overview

My research spans applied statistics, simulation, educational technology, and interdisciplinary collaborations in biology and engineering. This page automatically lists my publications from ORCID.

## Publications

::: {.callout-note}
This list is automatically generated from my ORCID profile:  
**[ORCID: 0009-0001-6722-0134](https://orcid.org/0009-0001-6722-0134)**
:::

```{r}
#| echo: false
# This chunk is optional — it simply prints the bibliography
```

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
```
